title: Solana Ventures leads $18 million round in Squads to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude
message_html: Solana Ventures leads $18 million round in Squads to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude ...
snippet: Squads, known for its Solana-based multisig protocol, has raised $18 million in new funding to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude.
